---
title: "addy-brutal-data-cleaning"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(stringr)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(knitr)
library(tidyr)
library(psych)

```

Now then, let's get started

```{r}
data = read.csv("data/translation_data_possible_duplicates.csv")
```

```{r}
translated_names <- c("record_type","target_audience", "title","author","original_title","genre","translator", "source_language", "source_literature","editor","author_of_foreword_or_afterword","place_of_publication","publisher", "year_of_publication", "physical_description", "edition_1", "series_information", "author_of_translated_book_under_review", "edition_2", "page_numbers", "content", "notes", "id") 
#Translated with DeepL.com (free version)

data_ed <- data
names(data_ed) <- translated_names
```

```{r}
data_ed |> filter(str_detect(edition_2, '<')) %>% select(, edition_2)
```

# section 1
I'll work on getting the very weird values out

Tyna is doing the standardization: splitting, making it conform.


# This is the important thing for cleaning edition_2


```{r}
colnames(data_ed)
```


```{r}

# [1] "record_type"                            "target_audience"                        "title"                                 
# [4] "author"                                 "original_title"                         "genre"                                 
# [7] "translator"                             "source_language"                        "source_literature"                     
#[10] "editor"                                 "author_of_foreword_or_afterword"        "place_of_publication"                  
#[13] "publisher"                              "year_of_publication"                    "physical_description"                  
#[16] "edition_1"                              "series_information"                     "author_of_translated_book_under_review"
#[19] "edition_2"                              "page_numbers"                           "content"                               
#[22] "notes"                                  "id"                                    

data_ed |> filter(physical_description== '')
```


```{r}
```

```{r}
col
```


```{r}
data_ed %>% filter(record_type == "Tõlkearvustus") %>% filter(author_of_foreword_or_afterword != "")
```


## ONLY THE CLEANING LINES!
```{r}

# title
data_ed$title = data_ed$title %>% str_replace(fixed("#D"), "") %>% str_replace(fixed("*"), "")
data_ed = data_ed %>% mutate(
  title = case_when(
    title == "" ~ NA,
    T ~ title
  )
  )

# author
data_ed = data_ed %>% mutate(
  author = case_when(
    author == "" |
    author == "π" |
    author == "teadmata" ~ NA,
    T ~ author
  )
  )

# original_title
data_ed = data_ed %>% mutate(
  original_title = case_when(
    original_title == "ˇteadmata" |
    original_title == "teadmata" ~ NA,
    T ~ original_title
  )
  )

# genre
data_ed$genre = data_ed$genre %>% str_replace("jutustusedd", "jutustused") %>% str_replace("nälestused", "mälestused") %>% str_replace("näidenid", "näidendid") %>% str_replace("rtomaanid", "romaanid") 
data_ed = data_ed %>% mutate(
  genre = case_when(
    genre == "" ~ NA,
    T ~ genre
  )
)

# translator
data_ed$translator = data_ed$translator %>% str_replace(fixed("<<mf>>"), "") %>% str_replace(fixed("|d"), " ")
data_ed = data_ed %>% mutate(
  translator = case_when(
    translator == "teadmata" |
    translator == "" ~ NA,
    T ~ translator
  )
)

# source_language
data_ed = data_ed %>% mutate(
  source_language = case_when(
    source_language == "" |
    source_language == "teadmata" ~ NA,
    T ~ source_language
  )
  )

# source_literature
data_ed = data_ed %>% mutate(
  source_literature = case_when(
    source_literature == "" |
    source_literature == "teadmata" ~ NA,
    T ~ source_literature
  )
  )

# editor
data_ed = data_ed %>% mutate(
  editor = case_when(
    editor == "" |
    editor == "teadmata" ~ NA,
    T ~ editor
  )
  )

# author_of_foreword_or_afterword
data_ed$author_of_foreword_or_afterword = data_ed$author_of_foreword_or_afterword %>% str_replace(fixed("ˇˇ"), "")
data_ed = data_ed %>% mutate(
  author_of_foreword_or_afterword = case_when(
    author_of_foreword_or_afterword == "" |
    author_of_foreword_or_afterword == "teadmata" ~ NA,
    T ~ author_of_foreword_or_afterword
  )
  )

# place_of_publication
data_ed = data_ed %>% mutate(
  place_of_publication = case_when(
    place_of_publication == "" |
    place_of_publication == "teadmata" ~ NA,
    T ~ place_of_publication
  )
  )

# publisher
data_ed = data_ed %>% mutate(
  publisher = case_when(
    publisher == "" |
    publisher == "teadmata" ~ NA,
    T ~ publisher
  )
  )

# physical_description
data_ed$physical_description = data_ed$physical_description %>% str_replace(fixed("ˇ"), "")
data_ed = data_ed %>% mutate(
  physical_description = case_when(
    physical_description == "" ~ NA,
    T ~ physical_description
  )
  )

# edition_1
data_ed$edition_1 = data_ed$edition_1 %>% str_replace(fixed("ˇˇ"), "")
data_ed = data_ed %>% mutate(
  edition_1 = case_when(
    edition_1 == "ˇˇ" |
    edition_1 == "" ~ NA,
    T ~ edition_1
  )
  )

# series_information
data_ed = data_ed %>% mutate(
  series_information = case_when(
    series_information == "ˇˇ" |
    series_information == "" ~ NA,
    T ~ series_information
  )
  )

# author_of_translated_book_under_review
data_ed$author_of_translated_book_under_review = data_ed$author_of_translated_book_under_review %>% str_replace(fixed("ˇˇ"), "")
data_ed = data_ed %>% mutate(
  author_of_translated_book_under_review = case_when(
    author_of_translated_book_under_review == "" |
    author_of_translated_book_under_review == "teadmata" ~ NA,
    T ~ edition_2
  )
  )

# edition_2
data_ed$edition_2 = data_ed$edition_2 %>% str_replace(fixed("<p>"), "") %>% str_replace(fixed("</p>"), "") %>% str_replace(fixed('<span style="font-weight: 400">'), '') %>% str_replace(fixed('</span>'), '')
data_ed = data_ed %>% mutate(
  edition_2 = case_when(
    edition_2 == "teadmata" |
    edition_2 == "" ~ NA,
    T ~ edition_2
  )
  )

# page_numbers
data_ed$page_numbers = data_ed$page_numbers %>% str_replace(fixed("ˇ"), "")
data_ed = data_ed %>% mutate(
  page_numbers = case_when(
    page_numbers == "" ~ NA,
    T ~ page_numbers
  )
  )

# content
data_ed$content = data_ed$content %>% str_replace(fixed("<p>"), "") %>% str_replace(fixed("</p>"), "") %>% str_replace(fixed("&nbsp;"), "") %>% str_replace(fixed("<br />"), " ")
data_ed = data_ed %>% mutate(
  content = case_when(
    content == "" ~ NA,
    T ~ content
  )
  )


# notes
data_ed$notes = data_ed$notes %>% str_replace(fixed("ˇ"), "") %>% str_replace(fixed("<<mf>>"), "")
data_ed = data_ed %>% mutate(
  notes = case_when(
    notes == "" ~ NA,
    T ~ notes
  )
  )
```


```{r}

# [1] "record_type"                            "target_audience"                        "title"                                 
# [4] "author"                                 "original_title"                         "genre"                                 
# [7] "translator"                             "source_language"                        "source_literature"                     
#[10] "editor"                                 "author_of_foreword_or_afterword"        "place_of_publication"                  
#[13] "publisher"                              "year_of_publication"                    "physical_description"                  
#[16] "edition_1"                              "series_information"                     "author_of_translated_book_under_review"
#[19] "edition_2"                              "page_numbers"                           "content"                               
#[22] "notes"                                  "id"                                    

data_ed %>% filter(str_detect(content, '[~ˇ#¤%<>|_+•¹@£$€]'))
```
